title: 祭りは準備が肝要ってな

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days have passed since Inari One's debut.
I'm planning out her schedule going forward,
when...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: The hell's the matter with these girls?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ahh... That took some weight off my shoulders...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Boss. Didn't mean to startle ya. I had no
idea what else to say.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, Boss. Didn't mean to startle ya. I had no
idea what else to say.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
After my debut... some of my classmates came
lookin' for a chat.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Inari, I saw your debut race! You ran so well out
there!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thanks! But this is just the beginnin'. My next
race'll be even better!

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you're so talented! No wonder you were
able to transfer.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? After seeing her run, I knew she was
too good for the regionals.

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: Your trainer scouted you, right? You're so lucky.

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Inari? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ah, no... it's nothin'.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. I just remembered I needa do somethin'.
Catch ya later.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And thanks for watchin' my debut race! Bye!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: Wha—Inari?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: That's what went down.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't stand listenin' to 'em anymore, so I
came here.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaddaya think about what they were sayin',
Boss?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaddaya think about what they were sayin',
Boss?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Why're they talkin' as if I "stepped up" from the
regionals to central?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Does everyone... look down on regional racing?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Well, that don't sit right with me at all. I won't
stand for it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Nobody looks down on my crew! That goes for my old teammates and the regionals as a whole!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But you know what? I realized somethin' after
transferring here.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The central races are big—way bigger than the
regionals. Which means they draw in more
spectators. That's a clear fact.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
My classmates were likely talkin' about that
difference in scale. They weren't tryna be rude.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: But still...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I won't let anyone say that our passions, our
dreams, and our skills don't compare to what's in
the centrals!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll scream it at the top of my lungs if I have to!
But...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Bein' so fresh off my debut, no one's gonna listen
to what I got to say. I think that's a given.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So... I've made up my mind.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna really stand out in the Twinkle Series.
Build up a huge reputation.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If I don't have a voice right now, then I just gotta
push through until I do!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And then, lemme tell ya, I'll be like the grand
finale at the festival fireworks—too big and too
loud to ignore!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Howzat sound? Startin' today, that's my new goal.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, right? You 'n' me seem to be on the same
wavelength.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, right? You 'n' me seem to be on the same
wavelength.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's the two of us, aimin' for the biggest stage to
hold our biggest festival! That's where I'll stand
tall! And then...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll let 'em all know that everyone down in
Oi—heck, every racer in the regionals for that
matter—has just as much fight as the central
racers!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With that declaration, we finally have our goal—give the centrals a show they'll never forget!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later on, during our training session...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, Boss, we've got a festival to plan! So, if
we want this show to go off with a bang, what do I
gotta do?
choice_data_list:
Let's steadily improve your performance and
gain more experience.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, Boss, we've got a festival to plan! So, if
we want this show to go off with a bang, what do I
gotta do?
choice_data_list:
Let's steadily improve your performance and
gain more experience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to strive for the top during her
junior year. We should prioritize honing her skills
and strengthening her body over gaining notable
victories.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to see her build real experience in the
centrals. If she's to take on bigger challenges in
the classic year, we need to start preparing now.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I see what ya mean! It takes a lotta prep to
put on a huge festival.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's switch lanes—from the road of
tussles 'n' scraps to the highway of masterin'
oneself!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Perfect! Now that we settled that, let's start
trainin' already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With big hopes for the future ahead, our
hot-blooded junior year begins!
